# Attached PlantUML JAR

`plantuml.jar` is the official compiled PlantUML `v1.2026.4` release:

- Source: <https://github.com/plantuml/plantuml/releases/tag/v1.2026.4>
- Asset: <https://github.com/plantuml/plantuml/releases/download/v1.2026.4/plantuml-1.2026.4.jar>
- SHA-256: `ebe66f9e67a12dc7aca4e10af67ab29b10ffa281bc72147dbfdc4c00d9de7664`

The JAR is invoked locally by `server.js` to render SVG diagrams. PlantUML licensing information is available from the [official download page](https://plantuml.com/download).
